textByHash.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
textByHash.09932bb8c119c372d998dca1544a8be26190fb23: Thank you. The battlefield is to the north of the maze. Commander Montai will inform you of their current situation.
textByHash.0e269468d4e36f555d139b4a03f1a557ba2be0d0: Well hello stranger. My name's Bolren, I'm the king of the tree gnomes.
textByHash.0ec1f711c73709cbbde4c107eddb68c1e25b6a00: You'll find Aluft Gianne jnr. in his restaurant at the Grand Tree. Good luck!
textByHash.1821ec59e3ceed3a832bf480be24dc036349f8a0: Hello there. It's good to see you again.
textByHash.1beea0877b279201e8e4605651d129977029345d: Hello traveller, we must retrieve the orb. It's being held by Khazard troops north of here.
textByHash.1d091d7de9ff96c120ca19702bad7f3360b1001d: They came in the night. I don't know how many, but enough.
textByHash.1d6477a8e85a19ce0eb822554d1faf532316ff46: Please, we must have the orbs if we are to survive.
textByHash.20dd9f0179a4952d6cf40f2df5ed42f897068148: I'm sure Aluft Gianne jnr. can help. You'll find him in his restaurant at the Grand Tree. Good luck!
textByHash.21626ef07f07c10baf73b108c7d401a4e6b6833b: Once the orbs are replaced we will be safe once more. We must begin the ceremony immediately.
textByHash.2d1a1597a9e7e3351c678c1a1d5ce6fdec30b4f5: Ah, that is a problem. I wish I could offer more help, but the Khazard Army already poses a major threat to us. We can't afford to split ourselves fighting two different enemies.
textByHash.308ad3e5f0ce8d4bf2557a9bc916cd13efd0167c: That is if he's still alive.
textByHash.3512c76384ea0b451216d475b98383245998cbc5: You are brave, but this task will be tough even for you. I wish you the best of luck. Once again you are our only hope.
textByHash.37b832436272a2bc9da497c71b2ceaef3195feda: I don't think so. What does one look like?
textByHash.3bda9bc15087fccf9a1df8fc61cc75cafdeefb5c: No, I suppose not. Still, if you want to find Arposandra, finding Longramble might not be a bad place to start.
textByHash.3e492e778040f18afe4a44a4151fdae03ab83dc4: I'm not sure, but I bet Aluft Gianne jnr. could help. His restaurant can supposedly deliver food to any gnome, no matter where they are.
textByHash.3f8b6983ee7dff30312e5444027bd38297076c2b: Yes, of course! Still, that won't be an easy feat. It is said that after Glouphrie was driven out of our lands, he founded the hidden city of Arposandra. To find him, we must first find Arposandra!
textByHash.4475bc831f47abd2cb8ecbd522d3ea4821d32054: Now at last my people are safe once more. We can live in peace again.
textByHash.568e24680e6bfb3b1872667a57decb8084953e91: Why did Glouphrie send so many there, but only one here?
textByHash.5efe39e607355dcd9359da2e3823f8f4d2f304a1: Thank you. I don't have any gnome cooks here. I should really do something about that.
textByHash.6096151fd87e026dac944d373b7ff9937cddd0bb: I will safeguard this orb and pray for your safe return. My assistant will guide you out.
textByHash.60ed46560055cb4a9a3560a2301bdeb3853a3716: That's outrageous! The Gnome Stronghold is not six times more important than our village here! He should have sent at least four watchers, maybe five!
textByHash.6a6aadc58f8b2c4e9863236cf525801140db5e30: The tree has many other powers, some of which I cannot reveal. As a friend of the gnome people, I can now allow you to use the tree's magic to teleport to other trees grown from related seeds.
textByHash.6c10c5ad8b343711b5ab602ef01f828b7c22180c: They headed north of the stronghold. A warlord carries the orbs.
textByHash.6f04ec0323a3f956bb8d460b3444086ab5ca5d7e: Thank you for dealing with that... thing. I apologise for not believing you before.
textByHash.701fb2af9775b54ee241695ac28d0723d025b215: You would be a huge benefit on the battlefield. If you would go there and try to retrieve the orb, my people and I will be forever grateful.
textByHash.722f1df2b8c126ae64d78ee988e7b3781fff5b5d: Hooray, you're amazing. I didn't think it was possible but you've saved us.
textByHash.72ff55c491291cb8753078de521f23f29b8e7a18: We are not a violent race, but we fight when we must. Many gnomes have fallen battling the dark forces of Khazard to the North.
textByHash.76c2b828815a425058985055792a584dc409639c: Yes, one of my citizens. Longramble is a bit of an explorer. He's been out there searching for Arposandra for some time.
textByHash.7a7ccd22a543a2584bbbe1a8f1f22de0ac0a56f4: Khazard troops. They slaughtered anyone who got in their way. Women, children, my wife.
textByHash.7d2b468b506f238b203d32a6c2daba71cec3fba0: The orb is being held at the battlefield north of the maze.
textByHash.80dec5f1ff3451995ded9564c4c62d01ed2258f9: Here, I think this belongs to you.
textByHash.82dec0f7d76f53a218a059752dbf94897199f9c3: Thank you traveller, but it's too late. We're all doomed.
textByHash.84fde6eed387f96d3dda7150ccd058d1fd323f13: Please, for your efforts take this amulet. It's made from the same sacred stone as the orbs of protection. It will help keep you safe on your journeys.
textByHash.898a83725e8157c9298c81890613f2a0b3d50bef: You made it back! Do you have the orbs?
textByHash.8b8527afea130a407c755034f88bf9112f25a682: For now, I'm afraid so. Glouphrie is a foe that must be dealt with one day, but that day is not today.
textByHash.90530834634b62c2148354c7f79e8413e05fb5ce: Oh my... The misery, the horror!
textByHash.978d43af3752ebe10768d9f16bc0d0790c3efdfd: The truth is my people are in grave danger. We have always been protected by the Spirit Tree. No creature of dark can harm us while its three orbs are in place.
textByHash.98cdd2215f7d4441b3c11ff0e3868c51127d6172: You've been listening to too many gnomish children's stories! Glouphrie hasn't been seen since before I was King. He's almost certainly long-dead by now.
textByHash.9b5b8ea675cb8d20bdf7743dd7939a4be5901535: Hello there. Any luck in the quest for Arposandra?
textByHash.9dee6bfe281903dc3e57ebe767051ab6884c5f98: I fear the war against the Khazard Army is set to outlive us all. We keep making progress, but for every foe we defeat, Khazard sends two more.
textByHash.a2351f77795bbc23f6c6c07b6a25a2ef4aee721a: Khazard troops seized the orb. Now we are completely defenceless.
textByHash.a49049935a88f52f188e1d479c7cb45b3ba4fcdc: He did a lot of work down in the caves. I think he liked how nice and quiet it was down there.
textByHash.a6327b8526450d5c6e583db4f529c9e37978d969: Those Khazard troops continue to be a menace, but things are much better now. All thanks to you, of course.
textByHash.a7a2f8b923d9cd6d48f00190ba6ede73bf4d3c3d: Hey! Dumpling isn't evil. She has cute ears and a little bobbly tail!
textByHash.aa93b691c071cb56ea41292c48fa42ce16417cca: My assistant shall guide you out. Good luck friend, try your best to return the orb
textByHash.ae27bd230c7c87da0d249645b53d36a23a5a47fa: Well, it sadly seems you were right. Please get rid of the nasty creature. Then we can talk.
textByHash.af8f1735cbd4b6708d8d731bcb46e60f0672c60c: Still, we thankfully haven't had any more Glouphrie problems at least.
textByHash.b4b7634f29e838135b9fa7990d1dc7e87180fb4c: I understand, this isn't your battle.
textByHash.b8eb5ff62a831045a6d6bb34bb9f60f58c8f7e90: Did you have a look down in the caves?
textByHash.c297b77472cf7cdc3f5eac79c358eb42d4cc1d0b: Indeed. Many a gnome has tried and failed to find the city. Some, like Longramble, are still out there searching for it.
textByHash.c5ab93e9c0171e3f2485241989775df93a767882: Hello there. How goes the quest for Arposandra?
textByHash.c9f02ee648d554b428713a29fe23987e7bff10e6: Oh, and if you find Glouphrie, tell him... tell him... I'm very angry with him!
textByHash.cbed321b509a59921f1a1d1fcf5628ef3c171685: They took the other orbs, now we are defenceless.
textByHash.d8af766fd9c5e5cda56526b3d4cec69f40bd207c: It's going to need to be very solid proof for me to just cast Dumpling aside. She's become my constant companion!
textByHash.d925280f46bb2418cab6fa0688c7cdd2d1bdf174: While I am glad the matter has been sorted, I must admit that this situation has me quite concerned. You said that there were many of these creatures posted all around the Gnome Stronghold?
textByHash.d98de9bd53c8aa0a5571adfa46981c8bfd8b2549: We became desperate, so we took one orb of protection to the battlefield. It was a foolish move.
textByHash.de840c347ae570bc9452010a7279d22b6624e6d7: Hello there. Any luck finding Longramble?
textByHash.e25d0a586a7d2af3468286cb4edb8334fc255463: Oaknock's son, of course! He visited a long time ago, before I was even King. I remember he brought all sorts of strange things with him, including some elven crystals!
textByHash.e50f331a1b879ca329ca0f05aba899b32329303f: Well, yes. I mean no, of course not. Still, Glouphrie has a lot to answer for! If I ever get my hands on him I'll... er... I'll give him a good talking to!
textByHash.e71b84c9ae245dea8e2ac37e5f3279fe228cb769: Crystal? As in elven crystal? I haven't seen any elven crystal around here since...
textByHash.eb97ebe0e3ec164f13213ba59116099d8864f3d4: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive.
textByHash.efd514ed7c0e53d6cd307af7bd0789804c68869d: I'm surprised you made it in, maybe I made the maze too easy.
textByHash.f169eb6144262d31deb6c14ec743f40678fecc6c: He said that he was sure Arposandra was somewhere between here and the edge of the world.
textByHash.f3b135b97ad56a59e7a5f28de833b9ef5075e8c1: The spirit tree has looked over us for centuries. Now we must pay our respects.
textByHash.fbdb3120a8bfe5625e64ef719226861ad99d1db9: I'm afraid I have more serious concerns at the moment. Very serious.
